notes: Fajr Jamaat is fifteen minutes after Sehri ends. Dhuhr/Jumu'ah Jamat shown in column. Maghrib Jama'at: ten minutes before Dhuhr column times where noted. Taraweeh salah is an emphasised sunnah. I'tikaaf in last 10 days of Ramadhan is also a sunnah. Women programme every Sunday after Dhuhr salah. Receiver cost £30. Fadaail-e-Ramadhan and Profit from Ramadhan recommended reading. Subah Sadiq calculated using 18 degrees method.
address: The Grange, Hamstead Hill, Birmingham B20 1BH
